a_image.alt: Y2K Aesthetic style mood board — Millennium Era · 1998–2003

sections.a_eyebrow: Nostalgic · Retro · Gradient · Bold Colors · Glossy
sections.a_description: Silver metallics, baby blue and hot pink gradients, and the glossy sheen of an era obsessed with the future — Y2K aesthetic captures the bubbly, chrome-dipped optimism of the millennium turn. Think inflatable furniture, butterfly hair clips, and flip phone interfaces wrapped in iridescent shimmer and rounded, pillowy shapes that feel like they could bounce off the screen.

Y2K aesthetic has surged back on fashion brand lookbooks, Gen-Z lifestyle platforms, and pop culture nostalgia sites celebrating the early 2000s revival. You’ll find it on music artist landing pages, beauty and cosmetics brands channeling Paris Hilton-era glamour, and trend-forward e-commerce sites that want their design to feel playful, glossy, and unapologetically fun.

a_image_cover.alt: Y2K Aesthetic style use case illustration
Y2K Aesthetic style use case illustration
Y2K Aesthetic style use case illustration

sections.a_description: Silver-chrome background gradient shifting from baby blue (#b8d4e3) to lavender (#d4b8e3) to hot pink (#e3b8d4) — the iridescent shimmer of the millennium era. A radial gradient pseudo-element adds a glossy white hotspot in the upper-left, mimicking the reflective sheen of inflatable furniture and chrome accessories. The .inner panel has a semi-transparent white background (rgba white at 0.15) with a 1px iridescent border (rgba white at 0.4) and generous border-radius (20px) — bubbly, rounded, tactile. Text is white with subtle text-shadow for a soft glow effect. Buttons are pill-shaped (50px border-radius) with glossy gradient fills — primary uses a hot pink to magenta gradient, secondary is a frosted chrome outline. Everything feels like a Paris Hilton-era flip phone interface crossed with a Winamp skin. Set in Outfit across all elements — a clean geometric sans-serif with rounded terminals that captures the optimistic, bubbly Y2K spirit without going novelty. Heading at weight 800 with -0.5px letter-spacing for bold, chunky impact. Eyebrow at weight 500, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing. Body at weight 400, 1.6 line-height. Buttons at weight 600, uppercase, 1px letter-spacing. Alternatives: Nunito (rounder, softer bubble feel), Comfortaa (ultra-round Y2K vibe), Varela Round (single-story a, casual warmth).
